infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Smart Hockey Coach needs access to your camera to record your hockey shots for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Smart Hockey Coach needs access to your microphone to record audio with your shot videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Smart Hockey Coach needs access to your photo library to save recorded videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Smart Hockey Coach needs permission to save recorded videos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Smart Hockey Coach to access your camera for recording shots.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Smart Hockey Coach to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Smart Hockey Coach to save photos.
